entrypoints.responsibility: CLI entrypoints and console-first command surface that choose the runtime path for browser launch, one-shot chat, server, project/ops commands, diagnostics, and hub management.

configuration-doctor.responsibility: Loads, normalizes, and validates runtime configuration with field-table driven YAML/env merge and starter-environment diagnostics.

client-tui.responsibility: Runs one-shot CLI chat and local runtime commands, and provides reusable HTTP/SSE client behavior; the old interactive TUI remains only as a deprecated compatibility stub.

server-chat-pipeline.responsibility: Server bootstrap, API and console routing, chat execution, semantic-memory-aware prompt assembly, per-request tool policy, SSE streaming, and provider/config/runtime endpoints.

auth-plugin-loading.responsibility: Enforces API auth policy, loopback console/dashboard exceptions, plugin manifest validation, and trusted plugin skill/MCP boundaries.

extensions-tools.responsibility: Builds unified skill/plugin/MCP snapshots, runs built-in plugin lifecycle hooks, mirrors runtime skills into the workspace, and exposes tool and HTTP surfaces to the server and agent loop.

workspace-data.responsibility: Persists sessions, transcripts, projects, usage, schedules, and shared runtime state as local workspace files.

automation-gateway-browser.responsibility: Runs background agent jobs, channel and report surfaces, schedule/ops automation, and browser orchestration outside the chat request lifecycle.

external-integrations.responsibility: Bridges TARS to host launchd services, browser relay traffic, human OTP waits, provider credential strategies, and provider-specific transport adapters.

project-autopilot-dashboard.responsibility: Manages project briefs, tool/workflow policy, board and activity documents, backlog planning, dispatch/review, heartbeat-driven autonomous progress, and dashboard rendering.

project-swarm-dogfooding.responsibility: Documents how the bundled project workflow skills align with the current autopilot implementation and where gaps remain.

skillhub-distribution.responsibility: Searches the remote TARS Hub, installs or updates skills/plugins into the workspace, and records installed registry state.

semantic-memory.responsibility: Indexes explicit memories, compaction summaries, and project documents into embeddings and injects relevant recall into prompts and tools.
